title: sorghum bicolor var. subglobosum
intro: Sorghum bicolor var. subglobosum, also known as the subglobosum sorghum or broom sorghum, is a variety of sorghum, a type of flowering plant native to Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of sorghum bicolor var. subglobosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
